item.title: Eastern Conference Standings ()
item.description: Eastern Conference Standings () --------------------- Carolina Hurricanes – 82 pts (0.463) Tampa Bay Lightning – 80 pts (0.46) Buffalo Sabres – 76 pts (0.422) Pittsburgh Penguins – 75 pts (0.424) Montreal Canadiens – 75 pts (0.424) New York Islanders – 75 pts (0.41) Detroit Red Wings – 74 pts (0.411) Boston Bruins – 71 pts (0.401) Washington Capitals – 69 pts (0.371) Columbus Blue Jackets – 66 pts (0.379) Ottawa Senators – 66 pts (0.373) Philadelphia Flyers – 65 pts (0.367) Florida Panthers – 63 pts (0.35) Toronto Maple Leafs – 63 pts (0.35) New Jersey Devils – 60 pts (0.333) New York Rangers – 53 pts (0.299) ---------------------

item.title: Western Conference Standings ()
item.description: Western Conference Standings () --------------------- Colorado Avalanche – 87 pts (0.5) Dallas Stars – 81 pts (0.458) Minnesota Wild – 80 pts (0.437) Vegas Golden Knights – 70 pts (0.389) Anaheim Ducks – 69 pts (0.39) Utah Mammoth – 66 pts (0.367) Edmonton Oilers – 66 pts (0.361) Seattle Kraken – 65 pts (0.367) San Jose Sharks – 62 pts (0.356) Nashville Predators – 62 pts (0.35) Los Angeles Kings – 62 pts (0.35) Winnipeg Jets – 56 pts (0.316) Calgary Flames – 55 pts (0.311) Chicago Blackhawks – 55 pts (0.306) St. Louis Blues – 53 pts (0.294) Vancouver Canucks – 43 pts (0.243) ---------------------
